page.content: The data from Table 1 presents the overall biotin percentages and the surface area of the fiber in square meters per gram alongside biotin molecules per nanometer squared, with PLA and PLA/PLA-b-PEG comparisons. For the row labeled 0, the values are Overall Biotin %: 0, Surface Area of the Fiber (m2/g) for PLA: 2.1, PLA/PLA-b-PEG: 5.5, Biotin Molecules/nm2 for PLA: 0, PLA/PLA-b-PEG: 0. In the row labeled 5, the values are Overall Biotin %: 5, Surface Area of the Fiber (m2/g) for PLA: 2.7, PLA/PLA-b-PEG: 7.5, Biotin Molecules/nm2 for PLA: 0.7, PLA/PLA-b-PEG: 8. The row labeled 10 shows Overall Biotin %: 10, Surface Area of the Fiber (m2/g) for PLA: 2.3, PLA/PLA-b-PEG: 9.3, Biotin Molecules/nm2 for PLA: 0.5, PLA/PLA-b-PEG: 9.

page.content: In the final row labeled 18, the values are Overall Biotin %: 18, Surface Area of the Fiber (m2/g) for PLA: 3.0, PLA/PLA-b-PEG: 7.2, Biotin Molecules/nm2 for PLA: 14, PLA/PLA-b-PEG: 37. Table 2 catalogs various data IDs, tissues, and treatments, starting with Data ID GSE7895 for Bronchial Brushing involving Smokers (30), non-smokers (20), former smokers (51), followed by GSE19667 for Bronchial Brushing with Smokers (65), non-smokers (45), GSE12251 & GSE1480 for Colonic biopsies with Responders (20) and non-responders (27) pre-treatment, GSE16879 for Responders (8) and non-responders (16) pre-/post-treatment, E-MTAB-1842, GSE50254 for Rat parenchyma with main stream smoke (8, 15, or 23 μg nicotine/l) or fresh air, 5 animals per group, E-MTAB-1272 for NHBE cells 2, 4, 6, and 8 hours after washing of CDK4/6 inhibitor, 3 samples per group, and E-MTAB-1311 for NRBE cells with vehicle control or TNF α (0.1, 1, 10, 100 ng/ml) across (30 min, 2 h, 24 h), 3 samples per group.
